info.name: 📌 DeepSeek API
info.description:
### About

"DeepSeek is a Chinese artificial intelligence company that develops open-source large language models."

### Prerequisites

- Postman Account
    
- DeepSeek Account: [https://platform.deepseek.com/](https://platform.deepseek.com/)
    

### Usage

1. Create a fork
    
2. Update collection variables
    
3. Send requests
    

### Documentation

- API: [https://api-docs.deepseek.com/](https://api-docs.deepseek.com/)
    
- Models: [https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing](https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing)

OK
